final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 exploded-view reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering approach are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧: 结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写
  右上: 材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中: 纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部: 穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (真实写实人物全身站姿) wearing a complete 少数民族服饰 ensemble as the central subject — model selects the most representative 民族 and 服饰体系 autonomously; all key garment components, structural layers, and accessory elements must be present and anatomically accurate
Scene/backdrop: must be a flat paper-texture background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, evoking archival museum display boards
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, scholarly, evenly-lit atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, archival direction anchored by the authentic colors of the chosen 民族服饰 — exact palette ratios and accent choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs authentic textile surface rendering (织物、刺绣、染料、金属配饰) — exact grain and sheen levels are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all annotation text in 简体中文 only — including: 主标题、副标题、导语、部件引线标注、材质说明、纹样寓意说明、色彩含义说明、核心特征总结; no English, no pinyin, no romanization, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve complete layout structure across all 5 zones; all Chinese text must be legible, well-spaced, and typographically clean; garment structure must be anatomically and culturally accurate; material swatches must appear as distinct texture samples with captions; color palette must appear as labeled swatches with cultural meaning annotations
Avoid: 海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感; over-decoration; incorrect structural annotations; blurry or garbled text; fake or generic textures; English or pinyin text anywhere in the image
